project_type: React + TypeScript + Vite frontend for an AI-powered weather/clothing chatbot
test_framework: No test framework configured in frontend
verification_instructions: Run `npm run build` in the frontend directory to verify TypeScript compilation and Vite bundling succeeds without errors
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode - can install npm packages. Node.js v22 available via nvm.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md found. Standard React/TypeScript conventions apply.
key_patterns: Vanilla CSS with CSS custom properties for theming. Dark color scheme with orange accent (#FF6B35). Components use separate .css files imported directly. React Router for navigation. AuthContext for authentication state. WebSocket service for real-time chat streaming.
directory_structure: frontend/src/components/ - React components (Chat, Home, Login, Signup, Layout, UserMenu, Navigation). frontend/src/services/ - API, auth, websocket services. frontend/src/contexts/ - AuthContext. frontend/src/config/ - API config. Styling is split across index.css (global/theme), App.css (component styles), and component-specific .css files (Auth.css, Layout.css, UserMenu.css).
